creator: raimeetravel
caption:
2026 travel rules & updates to know! Plus my fave way to save money & stay on top of things when abroad (use code RAIMEE7 to get $5 off your @mynomadesim !!)
#travelindustry #2026travel #travelrules ad

transcription.text: there are some new travel rules and updates happening in 2026 so if you're going anywhere especially internationally you're going to want to know about these. first one is new europe entry and exit rules that you cannot ignore. sadly by april of this year they're going to be moving away from passport stamps and doing everything digitally, scanning your face, taking your fingerprints, and even more importantly by fall of this year the etis is supposed to finally roll out. this is being called a visa. it's not a visa it's just a pre-approval form that you'll have to fill out before you enter certain countries in europe. it will cost money so make sure you check whether it has been rolled out before your euro trip this year. a lot of these things are meant to help speed up the process at customs and immigration so i'm all for that because i love efficiency at airports. so one other thing i do is i have a nomad e-sim downloaded before i get on any flight internationally. this helps me stay connected to my data and wi-fi wherever i am abroad. they have plans in over 200 destinations around the globe. it's just an app on your phone and it is a must for any international trip especially if you want to save money on data and roaming and who doesn't. here's my code that will also get you money off your nomad e-sim plan. okay another thing to be aware of for 2026 travel is it's the world cup this year and if you're going anywhere in the u.s mexico or canada this summer i would make sure you're not overlapping with any world cup events. flights hotels etc are going to be more expensive. okay those are some of the big changes but there's a lot more so i'll do a part two and comment nomad i'll send you the link to get your e-sim for your next international trip. bye!
